## Change type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance
- [ ] Documentation

## Validation

<!-- List commands run and any manual device/platform checks. -->

- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] Android checked, when affected
- [ ] iOS checked, when affected
- [ ] Offline/recovery behavior checked, when affected

## Product and quality checklist

- [ ] The change stays within the product boundaries in `docs/vision.md`.
- [ ] Domain behavior is covered by tests.
- [ ] Persistence/event schema changes include migration or compatibility coverage.
- [ ] UI changes support semantics, text scaling, contrast, and reduced motion as applicable.
- [ ] Scryfall-related changes respect caching, attribution, and current API policy.
- [ ] Documentation and ADRs are updated when behavior or architecture changes.
